ResearchProjectDef.label: abyssal signal theory
ResearchProjectDef.description: Controlled interaction with extra-dimensional hostile signatures through machine-assisted ritual geometry. Unlocks the Abyssal Forge and Abyssal Summoning Circle.

ResearchProjectDef.label: abyssal armaments
ResearchProjectDef.description: Weaponized containment of breach-energy for early abyssal firearms and melee gear.

ResearchProjectDef.label: abyssal augmentation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Military infernal augmentation theory, laying the groundwork for the first boss-derived implant tier.
